title: Price predictions 5/27: BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ZEC, ADA, XMR
summary: Bitcoin briefly lost the $75,000 level after net flows into spot BTC ETFs turned negative. Do technical charts point to a BTC and altcoin recovery?

title: Mastercard secures New York BitLicense for crypto operations
summary: The payments giant can now legally conduct digital asset business activity in New York as it deepens its focus on blockchain-based settlement systems.

title: Warner Bros. Prices $15 Billion Loan Deal Amid High Demand
summary: Warner Bros. Discovery Inc. priced $15 billion of investment-grade loans on Wednesday, as the media company refinances debt ahead of its pending acquisition by Paramount Skydance Corp.

title: Salesforce Earnings Can Put AI Fears to Bed, Give Stock a Lift
summary: While software stocks rebound from the artificial intelligence-driven wipeout earlier this year, Salesforce Inc. hasn’t really benefited. But its earnings after the close Wednesday could pull the company’s shares out of their malaise.

title: Miami IT Worker Arrested in $1.9 Million Bitcoin Theft from Former Boss

Miami IT Worker Arrested in $1.9 Million Bitcoin Theft from Former Boss
A Miami man is facing multiple felony charges after allegedly stealing nearly $2 million in bitcoin from a former employer, with the theft going unnoticed for years as the funds remained locked in a safe.

title: Cash App Now Supports Stablecoins, Despite Bitcoin Maxi Jack Dorsey's 'Gatekeeper' Gripes
summary: Cash App has begun supporting stablecoin transactions on networks including Ethereum and Solana, pushing past its Bitcoin-based roots.

title: OpenAI Foundation Pledges $250 Million to Help Cushion AI's Economic Disruption
summary: The philanthropic arm of ChatGPT maker OpenAI will fund research, worker support, and new models for sharing the gains from automation.

title: Kraken expands Earn suite with Bitcoin Vault paying yield on BTC holdings
summary: Bitcoin Vault routes deposits into DeFi lending protocols, including Aave and Morpho, to generate BTC rewards.

title: Aztec Labs acquires ZKPassport, pledges to keep privacy protocol and iOS mobile app open-source
summary: The Obsidion team, including co-founders Michael Elliot and Theo Madzou, will join Aztec Labs to continue developing ZKPassport.

title: Oil falls as Iranian state television reports details of peace proposal
summary: Broadcast said draft deal would restore Strait of Hormuz shipping within a month

title: Iran’s ultra-hardliners lash out at deal negotiators
summary: Influential conservative lawmakers insist Tehran stick to maximalist terms for ending conflict with Washington
